name: Tesque Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a large cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar and shortening. Add the pumpkin, tofu, and vanilla and beat until smooth.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, salt, nutmeg, and allspice.
5. Slowly add the dry ingredients to the pumpkin mixture, small amounts at a time, until completely mixed together. Stir in the raisins and walnuts.
6. Drop tablespoonfuls of the dough roughly 2 inches apart on the cookie sheet. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, until golden brown.
